title: Senate Armed Services Committee Holds UAP Hearing
detail: The Senate Armed Services Committee holds a hearing focused on UAP investigations and AARO's progress. Committee members express frustration with the pace of disclosure and question whether AARO has been granted full access to all classified UAP-related programs. Multiple senators report being denied access to specific classified programs that whistleblowers allege contain evidence of non-human technology. The hearing intensifies congressional pressure for full transparency on UAP matters and raises bipartisan concerns about potential executive branch obstruction of congressional oversight.
